search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizationsnetworks" $orgid$ | dedup id | rename id as "Network ID", organizationId as "Organization ID", timeZone as "Timezone", tags{} as "Tags", url as "URL", notes as "Notes" | table "Network ID", "Organization ID", "Timezone", "Tags", "URL","Notes"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizationsnetworks" $orgid$ | dedup id| search id="$row.Network ID$" organizationId="$row.Organization ID$" timeZone="$row.Timezone$" tags{}="$row.Tags$" url="$row.URL$" notes="$row.Notes$" &earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$
